jobs.title: Design of a Folding Fixture for Cardboard Template
jobs.description:
A mechanical folding fixture needs to be designed for a cardboard packaging template based on a given reference (see photos).

The goal is to pre-fold the flat cardboard blank in a clean and repeatable way using rollers.

Scope of Work:
	•	Design of a folding fixture based on the provided reference photos
	•	Implementation as a modular system using item aluminum profiles
	•	Integration of rollers for controlled pre-folding of the cardboard

Technical Requirements:
	•	Cardboard dimensions will be provided by me
	•	Roller dimensions will also be provided
	•	Rollers must always be mounted in pair

jobs.title: Scalable Property Media Website System Design
jobs.description:
I am looking for a web designer or developer to create a scalable website template system for a property media business.

The goal is to build one core website structure that can be easily duplicated and reused, along with 2-2 clean design variations (for example: modern, luxury, minimal, corporate).

These templates will be used for estate agents and property professionals, so they need to be professional, easy to update, and focused on generating enquiries.

Scope of Work

Build one reusable website system or template
Create 2 visual design variations
Property listing structure with reusable

jobs.title: XML & PDF Accessibility Conversion
jobs.description:
I need reliable help turning batches of scanned-PDF source files into two deliverables every time:  

1. A clean, well-structured XML file that mirrors the document hierarchy.  
2. A fully remediated PDF that passes PAC 3 and shows no errors against WCAG 2.1, PDF/UA, and Section 508 checkpoints.

My in-house workflow is built around Oxygen XML Editor, Adobe Acrobat Pro, ABBYY/RTR for OCR, and the usual accessibility validators, so you’ll need to be comfortable inside those tools. Attention to headings, reading order, alt-text, form-fields (when they appear), and precise tag placement is critic

jobs.title: Medieval Marginalia Illustrations
jobs.description:
I need a talented illustrator to create a series of medieval-style marginalia for digital media. The illustrations should include a mix of floral designs, animals, and supporting patterns. Bonus points for emphasis on the absurdity that was prevalent in medieval marginalia. 

Ideal Skills and Experience:
- Expertise in medieval art and illustration
- Proficiency in digital illustration tools
- A sense of humour
